sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zěn me le? Liǎn sè bú tài hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Senga nima bo'ldi? Rangging unchalik yaxshi emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что с тобой? Ты неважно выглядишь.
sentences.text_translation_en: What's wrong? You don't look well.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ tóu téng, hái yǒu diǎn fā shāo.
sentences.text_translation: Boshim og'riyapti, biroz isitmam ham bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У меня болит голова, и ещё немного температура.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have a headache, and I have a slight fever too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 没有。我想去医院看一下。
sentences.pinyin: Méi yǒu. Wǒ xiǎng qù yī yuàn kàn yí xià.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Я хочу сходить в больницу провериться.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. I want to go to the hospital to get checked.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng, wǒ zì jǐ kě yǐ qù.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не нужно, я сам могу пойти.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need, I can go by myself.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ fā shāo duō shao dù?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那很高。你最好马上去医院。
sentences.pinyin: Nà hěn gāo. Nǐ zuì hǎo mǎ shàng qù yī yuàn.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda baland. Darhol kasalxonaga borganing ma'qul.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это высокая. Тебе лучше сразу пойти в больницу.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's high. You'd better go to the hospital right away.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好。你知道医院怎么走吗？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Nǐ zhī dào yī yuàn zěn me zǒu ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. Ты знаешь, как пройти в больницу?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. Do you know how to get to the hospital?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 前面路口右转，走五分钟就到了。
sentences.pinyin: Qián miàn lù kǒu yòu zhuǎn, zǒu wǔ fēn zhōng jiù dào le.
sentences.text_translation: Oldindagi chorrahada o'ngga buriling, besh daqiqa yursangiz yetib borasiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: На перекрёстке впереди поверни направо, через пять минут дойдёшь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Turn right at the intersection ahead, walk five minutes and you're there.
sentences.speaker: A
